nasb.text: If a man lies with a woman so that there is a seminal emission, they shall both bathe in water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: If a man lies with a woman and has an emission of semen, both of them shall bathe themselves in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 至於女人，男人若是與她同睡性交，兩人都要用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 如果男女同房，二人都不洁净，必须沐浴，等到傍晚才能洁净。
